rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST FAILURE

The Analytics page could not be reached — the expected Analytics UI was not available to verify stat cards or the consistency heatmap.

Observations:
- Navigating to /app/room/analytics displayed a "404 Page not found" message with text "This route doesn't exist in Nora." 
- The sidebar showed an 'Analytics' label earlier, but no distinct clickable Analytics link could be found after multiple attempts.
- Attempts to interact with sidebar anchors repeatedly opened other pages (e.g., 'Pixel Room') instead of an Analytics view, preventing access to the feature.
